programmes.show_description: Robin's brother Norman comes to stay for two days and takes a shine to Chrissy; when the three of them go out to dinner, Robin gets food poisoning. S6 E5: Mum Always Liked You Best
With a child of their own on the way, Yvonne thinks Gary would do well to get some practice in by minding their 6 year old nephew, Arthur. S4 E2: In The Mood
The blunderingly inept master of disaster goes for a haircut - but ends up styling the other customers' hair - and causes chaos at a school fun day. E14: Hair by Mr. Bean of London
Drama series following the exploits of Life on Mars's DCI Gene Hunt. A royal wedding looms and it's up to Gene and a restless Alex to keep the streets quiet. S1 E2
Carol's cousin Aveline comes to stay; she is heavily pregnant. The Boswells are shocked, but Carol and Sandra are determined to help Aveline be independent. S7 E4: Love 'Em and Almost Leave 'Em
A selection of live performances from TV music shows in the 1960s for a genuine taste of the best of the '60s!
Pamela drops a bombshell by admitting that she's in love, and Brenda's horrified when she sees David in a restaurant with another woman. S3 E2: Deceiving
Sharon gets a visit from estranged husband Chris who is seeking a quick divorce so that he can marry his new love Angie - a blind woman - but Tracey has a few doubts. S10 E6: Blinded By Love
Mr. Bean gets to an appointment with the dentist after oversleeping and has trouble in the park with a bothersome fly. E5: The Trouble with Mr. Bean
When David buys a raffle ticket in aid of Conservative funds, Labour supporter Amy is shocked and accuses him of selling out the socialist principles he embraced when they met. S3 E6: Cause Celebre

Demelza gives birth and resolves to help Verity reconcile with Captain Blamey, and Ross welcomes old friend Dr Dwight Enys to Cornwall. Starring Aidan Turner. S1 E5
Adrian struggles with celebrity as Jack and Leonora's relationship blooms. Grandad, meanwhile, gets a reminder from the past. S7 E8
Sandra believes her premonitions will come true; for somebody it will spell doom, gloom and disaster. The panic even spreads to Carol's family as Carol moves out... S7 E2: She Dreams a Lot
Harry the signalman has fattened up a lovely turkey in time for Christmas, but the turkey seems to have other plans. S1 E2: Talking Turkey
The Honourable Teddy creeps upstairs every night and tries to get into Ivy's room, and Lady Lavender is bent on giving away her shares of the family fortune to the servants. S1 E2 The Deed of Gift
Chrissy and Norman have been dating for some weeks to the annoyance of Robin, who goes on a disastrous double date with Larry. S6 E6: Fire Down Below
Anna's au pair visa is set to expire, meaning she will have to leave England. The class decides the best way to get her to stay is to marry Anna off to an Englishman. S3 E6: Repent at Leisure
Alf is feeling the effects of the demon drink. Else is unsure whether it was the single glass of port or the sausages that made him ill. S5 E6: Party Night
Sandra believes her premonitions will come true; for somebody it will spell doom, gloom and disaster. The panic even spreads to Carol's family as Carol moves out... S7 E2: She Dreams a Lot

Arthur sells some goods to a Russian sailor when a ship arrives in port, but he swiftly finds himself involved in a diplomatic situation - and much worse off. S6 E5: From Fulham With Love
Chrissy and Norman have been dating for some weeks to the annoyance of Robin, who goes on a disastrous double date with Larry. S6 E6: Fire Down Below
The coast is clear for Gary to have a holiday with Phoebe, since Yvonne has packed her bags for a trip to Korea. But Gary also has to deal with an unexpected visitor. S4 E3: Out of Town
Rowan Atkinson stars as the hapless Mr. Bean. In this original award-winning episode, he takes an exam, sunbathes and goes to church with Richard Briers. Ep1: Mr. Bean
Drama series following the exploits of Life on Mars DCI Gene Hunt. Hunt and his faithful sidekicks are drawn to the London Met where he turns his attentions to taking on London's criminals. S1 E3
Carol is dating Leonard and Sandra fears that he might be intending to use her as a centrefold, but it seems his intentions are very different. S7 E5: Oh, the Shame of It
A selection of live performances from TV music shows in the 1960s for a genuine taste of the best of the '60s!
Pamela takes the day off work, David tells Malcolm the truth about what happened in the restaurant, and Brenda lets her mouth get the better of her. S3 E3: Requiting
Sharon, Tracey and Dorien all lose their jobs and the resulting financial crisis leads to a huge row - some home truths are revealed and the three of them hit rock bottom. S10 E7: Back To Zero
Rowan Atkinson creates more comic mayhem as Mr. Bean comes to the aid of a heart attack victim, fails miserably to post a letter, and flies off on holiday. E6: Mr. Bean Rides Again
When the hotel throws a party where the guests must adopt fancy dress and perform on stage, Amy dresses as a clown and turns David and Linda's romantic duet into a total farce. S3 E7: Party Night

With Jim gravely ill in Bodmin jail, Ross and Dwight launch a desperate mission to save him; meanwhile, Demelza is excited to attend a grand ball held by George. Starring Aidan Turner. S1 E6
Adrian's mooning over a new love, Joey's mooning over an old one and Jack's completely besotted with Leonora. S7 E9
Sandra becomes a heroine when she is involved in a mugging, but the truth is a little different to what Sandra claims with witnesses, press and the police involved. S7 E3: A Mark on the World
New station master Cecil Parkin is intent on making an impression at Hatley, but Jack is sure that he's already made an impression on his wife May. S1 E3: The Train Now Standing
Poppy arranges a secret assignation with James, and a fancy dress party is planned to celebrate Cissy's birthday which brings a few surprises. S1 E3 Love or Money

Mildred is upset that she has not received an invitation to Norman and Chrissy's wedding, but George has hidden it from her because he wants to go to a darts match. S6 E7: Another Bride, Another Groom
The school hosts a charity bazaar and needs a celebrity to be the Master of Ceremonies. Max claims to be friends with a British comedian, but turns out he's never met him. S3 E7: The School Fete
Alf is concerned to find that his neighbour's house has been sold to the Council for social housing. S5 E7

Arthur is only too willing to help when local eccentric Albert comes into an inheritance - but his help isn't necessarily needed. S6 E6: Waiting For Goddard
